title: Middle Eastern Crispy Mushroom Patties
description: A flavorful and crunchy vegetarian dish inspired by the Middle East, featuring pan-seared mushroom patties.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine crumbled bread, mushrooms, eastern spices, crumbly parmesan, and crumble.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Add the egg to the mixture and mix until the mixture is cohesive.
4. Season with salt and black pepper.
5. Divide the mixture into 4 equal portions.
6. Shape each portion into a patty.
7. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
8. Add the patties to the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
10. Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
